title: Conquest:Hearthfire
description: This mod is a Sub-mod of Conquest Reforged. In addition to bringing decoration blocks from Conquest Reforged, there are also many new blocks!
body:
![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35a4ab6544c2439b3d9500a5c0ecdd38a923c2a7.png)

# [Update 1.0.4](https://youtu.be/STcczm38Ta4)

# What is Conquest:Hearthfire?
Conquest:Hearthfire is the first official Sub-mod for [Conquest Reforged](https://conquestreforged.com/mod) that adds many new decoration blocks for both creative and survival builders. Hearthfire mod is a medieval-themed mod that offers the builders an even more aesthetic environment. Although the mod does not support survival mode yet, it will be fully available in the near future.

Currently the Hearthfire mod has several blocks from Conquest Reforged, but all decorative blocks from the Conquest Reforged mod will be added in future updates. As I add these blocks, I will also add new functions to them. Thus, they will be compatible with the survival mode and will offer you a unique experience with realistic crafting recipes.

# What Awaits You In The Future
- More decorative and atmospheric blocks.
- More profession/workstation blocks for realistic crafting.
- Optimised recipes and loot tables.
- Aesthetic sounds and particles.


# Why Make a New Mod Instead of Adding New Models to the CR Mod?
The main purpose of this mod is to allow builders to access decorative blocks in CR mod without having to use CR mod. So it's for players who just want to play vanilla Minecraft but also want the decorative contents in CR mod. Additionally, I will be able to add new models and features without waiting for CR to be updated.

# Who Am I?
I'm Smaug, a member of the Conquest Reforged team since 2016. I mostly tried to make new models for you. However, I also worked on the coding part of the mod from time to time.

For those who interested, I make streams on [Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/smaugthedeceiver) time to time. You can reach me there or on the Official [Discord](https://discord.gg/NBEPPf5r) server where you can get news about upcoming updates, technical support, suggest features, show off and discuss your worlds/builds.

# Credits
Huge thanks to [xone](https://modrinth.com/user/xone) for allowing me to add some of her models to the Hearthfire.
